title: Warmly Grilled Malaysian Chicken Skewers
description: A sweet and aerated Malaysian dish featuring chicken, robata-grill, and vegan-friendly options, perfect for a nostalgic meal. This recipe is a variation that can be adapted to vegan diets by substituting chicken with tofu or tempeh.

ingredients.name: chicken breast
ingredients.notes: or firm tofu for vegan option

instructions: Preheat the robata-grill to medium-high heat.
In a blender, combine coconut milk, lime juice, brown sugar, soy sauce, and olive oil to make the marinade.
Add garlic and ginger to the marinade and blend until smooth.
Cut the chicken or tofu into bite-sized pieces and thread onto the bamboo skewers.
Brush the marinade onto the chicken or tofu, making sure they are fully coated.
Season with salt and place the skewers on the robata-grill.
Grill the skewers for 10-12 minutes, turning occasionally, until they are cooked through.
Serve the skewers hot, garnished with chopped cilantro or scallions if desired.
